memos.fullContent:
NIGHTLY R&D MEMO — March 23, 2026

Topic: Full Portfolio Review
Confidence Level: High

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY:
After reviewing all three portfolio companies, the highest-ROI action item is fixing the Resolved webhook. The product funnel is built, the subscription model is designed, and beta users are identified. The only blocker is a broken webhook endpoint that prevents form submissions from reaching the CRM.

KEY FINDINGS:

1. GFS Fire Pros — Deal is strong but blocked on banker pre-qualification. DSCR of 2.32x is excellent. Recommend calling Live Oak Bank this week.

2. Resolved Family — Product is ready for beta. Webhook fix is a 1-2 hour engineering task. Once fixed, beta launch to 20-50 users can happen immediately. Conservative estimate: $5K MRR within 60 days.

3. The Scam Hotline — Sally is live and the book is written. Monetization path is unclear. Recommend parking this until GFS and Resolved are generating revenue.

RECOMMENDATION:
Fix the Resolved webhook before spending a dollar on ads. The product is ready. The plumbing is broken. One engineering session unlocks $5K/month.

NEXT STEPS:
- Schedule webhook fix session (Priority 1)
- Call Live Oak Bank for GFS pre-qual (Priority 2)
- Pay down Chase card to improve FICO for SBA application (Priority 3)

memos.topic: Resolved Family — Pre-Launch Funnel & Revenue Strategy
memos.author: R&D Team
memos.recommendation: 4-step sprint: (1) Fix webhook — one Claude Code session, this week. (2) 20-user beta — entrepreneur groups, free access, get completion rate + testimonials. (3) Update sales page — reframe as estate planning alternative, add $99 family plan order bump. (4) $200 Meta test — 3 creatives, 4-5 days, read CAC before scaling.
memos.fullContent:
R&D MEMO — March 26, 2026

Topic: Resolved Family Pre-Launch Funnel & Revenue Strategy
Confidence: High

ANALYST INPUTS:

MAVERICK (Growth): Add $99 family plan order bump at checkout — 20 min in SamCart, 15-20% revenue lift. Track scorecard-to-sale conversion before scaling ads. Add urgency to email drip with FRIEND50 as expiring offer in email 3-4.

ATLAS (Strategy): Reframe positioning — you're not a 'preparedness doc', you're democratized estate readiness vs. $3K attorney. Lead with post-death chaos angle: 'Most families spend 6-18 months in chaos after losing someone.' Referral flywheel post-purchase is the secret weapon — ask at the moment of relief.

FORGE (Product): Webhook fix IS the launch — 2-4 hours, one Claude Code session, nothing else matters. Add progress indicator to 59-question walkthrough (20-30% completion lift). Build 12-month update reminder email (Supabase created_at + 365 days) for $29 renewal revenue.

LEDGER (Finance): Run $200 Meta test FIRST to get CAC before committing budget. Factor affiliate revenue ($8-15 per customer average) into unit economics — changes bid cap math. Annual subscription is the MRR path: 500 customers at $29/yr = $14,500 baseline.

COMPASS (Ops): Do NOT run ads before webhook is fixed — chargebacks kill trust. Beta cohort before ads — 1 week, $0 budget, get completion data + testimonials. Meta ads need creative not budget — UGC-style video or stat hook, $200 test.

THE DEBATE:
Maverick vs Ledger on ad timing — Ledger wins: beta first, then test. Atlas vs Forge on positioning — Atlas wins long-term, update sales page now (no dev work). Compass vs Maverick on family plan — Maverick wins: SamCart order bump is 20 min, add at launch.

FINAL SPRINT (in order):
1. THIS WEEK: Fix the webhook (Claude Code session)
2. NEXT WEEK: 20-user beta cohort
3. WEEK 3: Update sales page positioning + add $99 order bump
4. WEEK 4: $200 Meta test — 3 creatives, 3 hooks, 4-5 days

ONE ACTION FOR JB: Open Claude Code. Fix the webhook. File: resolved-webhook-fix.md has the instructions.
